name: Apple-Nut Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, stir together flour, baking powder, soda, and salt. Set aside.
2. In a large bowl, beat together sugar and shortening until fluffy. Beat in egg and vanilla. Stir about half the dry ingredients into the sugar mixture. Mix in sour cream, then stir in the remainder of the dry ingredients. Mix in apple. Spread evenly in a lightly greased and floured 8-inch round pan.
3. In a small bowl, mix nuts, brown sugar, butter, and cinnamon until crumbly. Sprinkle over coffee cake.
4. Bake in a 350°F oven for 25 to 30 minutes, or until cake tests done. Serve warm.
